notes: Event study: Brent move in the 1/5/30 trading days after each Hormuz-threat event. d1 for 2019-09-14 and 2020-01-03 are widely reported settlements; other windows are approximations from the EIA public daily Brent series, to be recomputed exactly by scripts/fetch.mjs (EIA API, series RBRTE). The honest pattern: spikes mean-revert unless barrels actually go missing.
source: EIA — Europe Brent Spot Price FOB, daily

events.name: 2026 Hormuz crisis begins
events.note: The exception that tests the rule: barrels are actually missing this time. Windows to be computed from the EIA daily series via the fetch pipeline.
